one_time_description: New investment in Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership with income of $2,520,648 recognized in first year; also transfer of YIDC shares to partnership
economic_notes: Band has investments in Dena Nezziddi Development Corporation, Tu Lidlini Petroleum Corporation (51%), and Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership. Land claims negotiation ongoing with significant contingent liabilities. COVID-19 impact noted as of March 2020.
notes: Qualified audit opinion due to: (1) inventory audit limitation at Tu Lidlini Petroleum Corporation, (2) no financial budgets prepared or approved for FY2020. Three GBEs accounted for under modified equity method: Dena Nezziddi Development Corporation, Tu Lidlini Petroleum Corporation (51%), and Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership (new in 2020). Investment income of $3,011,591 is unusually high due to $2,520,648 share of earnings from new Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership. Band transferred YIDC shares to Dena Nezziddi Limited Partnership during the year. Significant contingent liabilities from land claims negotiations not recorded as liabilities. Health and Social Development combined as one segment; expenses_social set to 0 as it is included in expenses_health figure. Financial statements signed May 2022 for FY2020 period - significant reporting delay.
